title: pycnanthemum pycnanthemoides var. pycnanthemoides
intro: Pycnanthemum pycnanthemoides var. pycnanthemoides, also known as small mountain mint, is a perennial plant species in the mint family that is native to the southeastern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, sore throats, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of small mountain mint include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and promoting digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy. Small mountain mint can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
